displayTitle: War of the Bounty Hunters: Boushh
synopsis:
Before Princess Leia ever wore his armor, Boushh led a crew of *Ubese* exiles, Hareck, Brene, Ilini, and Tans, out of Ord Mantell City. Banished from Uba IV, their names erased from public record, the team wears its armor as a mark of shame and takes whatever work it can to survive. After a recovery job for Black Sun, Boushh is warned by Deva Lompop that his bad blood with underworld lords will one day put a price on his own head.

Desperate for stability, Boushh accepts a discreet, high-paying contract from a Crimson Dawn agent named Margo: assassinate the executive board of the Tagge Corporation. Aboard the Tagge flagship *Acquisitor*, Domina Tagge, who regards her own family as a nest of vipers, oversees testing of the volatile Tagge Protoblade and convenes a board meeting with her relatives, aware that spies have infiltrated the corporation. When Boushh's crew storms the ship, the cornered Silas Tagge confesses to leaking the board's location to Crimson Dawn, only for Domina to reveal she called the meeting to flush out the traitor. She executes Silas herself and lets the galaxy believe the bounty hunters did it. Domina then makes the Ubese a counteroffer that beats Crimson Dawn's price and promises to leverage the Tagge name to end their exile, in exchange for everything they know about their former employer.
title: War of the Bounty Hunters: Boushh
